notes: GNN-CB LLM baseline. Generated by Gemini 2.5 Pro (gemini-2.5-pro) under prompt_filled.md (temperature=0, top_p=0.99). 1 repair iteration. Pipeline: node features from data/public/nodes.csv with mean imputation for NaNs; undirected edge_index constructed by symmetrizing edges.csv and removing duplicates; 2-layer GCN (hidden=128) with ReLU + dropout=0.5; Adam lr=0.01 wd=5e-4; BCEWithLogitsLoss with pos_weight from train class ratio; early stop on Macro-F1 with patience=30 up to 300 epochs; predictions.csv has 19,226 rows with y_pred range [0.1070, 1.0000].
